result.rubric: abstain when observer_view is missing; fail any unsafe state, incomplete consequence, target outside admissible_targets, or incomplete communication; otherwise pass. Do not use native_target as authority when it conflicts with admissible_targets.

verdicts.reason: Observer view is complete, state is safe, consequence is complete, observed target is admissible, and communication is complete.
The consequence is incomplete and the observed target is outside admissible_targets.
Observer view is complete, state is safe, consequence is complete, observed target is admissible, and communication is complete.
The observed alternate target is included in admissible_targets; all other required conditions are complete and safe.
The observed target is admissible and controls over the conflicting stale native_target; all other required conditions are complete and safe.
